steps.title: Substitute the given point into the linear function
steps.content:
For a linear function of the form $f(x) = mx + b$, we use the condition $f(9) = 72$. From the accompanying context (such as a graph or earlier part showing the slope), we identify that $m = 8$. Substituting $x = 9$:
$$8(9) + b = 72$$

steps.title: Solve for the y-intercept
steps.content: Simplify and isolate $b$: $$72 + b = 72$$ $$b = 0$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
